summary: Frontend-only test of /delivery 'clickable order -> details dialog' feature. All 3 P1 scenarios PASSED on https://pwa-driver-track.preview.emergentagent.com.

tests_executed.name: All Orders tab - clickable order card opens details dialog
tests_executed.observations: [data-testid='order-details-dialog'] opened. Items: '2x برغر لحم 14,000 / 1x بطاطا 4,000 / 2x بيبسي 3,000'. Total: '25,000 IQD'. Cashier: 'غير محدد' (as expected for seed order). Status badge 'في الطريق' shown. Customer 'زبون أحمد' and driver 'سائق أحمد' shown. Creation time shown. Rejected badge correctly NOT present.

tests_executed.name: Rejected filter + #5002 details dialog with rejection block
tests_executed.steps: All Orders tab -> click filter chip 'مرفوض (1)' -> only #5002 shown -> click it
tests_executed.observations: Filter narrowed to exactly 1 card (delivery-order-demo-o-5002). Dialog opened. order-details-rejected-badge text='✕ مرفوض' present. order-details-rejection block text='سبب الرفض: نفاد المكوّن' + 'وقت الرفض: 11/6/2026 7:59:43 م'. Items: '3x شاورما دجاج 15,000 / 1x عصير 3,000'. Total: '18,000 IQD'.

tests_executed.name: Pending tab - today-movement / delivered-to-customer / out-for-delivery cards clickable
tests_executed.steps: Switch to 'طلبات جاهزة للتوصيل' tab; click cards in each of the 3 columns
tests_executed.observations: today-movement cards (12 found): click on [data-testid='today-movement-demo-o-5002'] opened order-details-dialog. delivered-to-customer cards (1 found): click on [data-testid='delivered-to-customer-demo-o-5004'] opened dialog. out-for-delivery cards (1 found): click on card body of [data-testid='out-for-delivery-demo-o-5001'] opened dialog. The 'تم التسليم' button is present inside the out-for-delivery card; per code review (Delivery.js lines ~1230-1300) all action buttons use e.stopPropagation() so they do not bubble to the card onClick. Live click on 'تم التسليم' was intentionally skipped to avoid mutating delivery state.

critical_code_review_comments: Delivery.js is 2228 lines (>700 line guideline). Consider splitting into smaller components (e.g., AllOrdersTab, PendingTab, OrderDetailsDialog) for maintainability.
openOrderDetails uses axios.get directly with manual headers; consider centralizing API client. (non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded rejected order demo-o-5002 (no new seed needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow requires ~14s wait for SplashScreen to clear before fillable inputs become responsive. /delivery page needs ~13s wait after navigation. All testids in Delivery.js are stable: order-details-dialog, order-details-items, order-details-total, order-details-cashier, order-details-rejected-badge, order-details-rejection, delivery-order-{id}, today-movement-{id}, delivered-to-customer-{id}, out-for-delivery-{id}, all-orders-tab.
